attempts.lesson: Repeated word/character vocabulary fitting and chi-square selection per head does not scale inside the execution window.
Feature construction was solved, but exact multiclass margin optimization remained the dominant cost; replace with bounded averaged SGD.
The 220-tree multiclass arbiter was unnecessarily expensive; reduce tree count and leaf count because the feature table is already distilled.
Even reduced boosting was wasteful on an already distilled low-dimensional table; use weighted convex multinomial heads.

attempts.architecture: atomic-operation head + learned compound mode + paired evidence availability
attempts.lesson: Disentangling operation, compound mode, and context solved seen contrast families but did not create broad paraphrase invariance; lexical representation remains the limiting factor.
